name: Thai Plaspac Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Plaspac Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes plastic packaging products in Thailand, India, and the United Arab Emirates. Its products include rigid plastic packaging materials, bottles and closure systems, containers, plastic-wares, and others. The company serves food and beverage, pharmaceutical, homecare, personal care, and industrial sectors. Thai Plaspac Public Company Limited was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
